summary: Multi-Tenant Filtering feature tested successfully. All backend APIs (tenants, hierarchy, top-level, filtered locations) return correct data. Frontend tenant dropdown in DeviceSetup works correctly - filtering locations by tenant updates the count and syncs properly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing tenant data from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant filtering is fully functional. Backend has 3 tenant endpoints under /api/unified-locations/tenants*. Frontend DeviceSetup.jsx has tenant dropdown with data-testid='tenant-filter-dropdown'. Admin access via PIN 9988 -> Geräte & Scanner tab -> Geräteeinrichtung accordion opens by default.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/unified-locations/tenants/hierarchy - Returns hierarchical structure (continents, countries, stations)
Tenant level filtering (continent, country) works correctly
frontend_ui_tests: Admin login with PIN 9988 - Opens AdminPanel
Navigation to Geräte & Scanner tab - Works
Tenant dropdown visible with Filter icon
Dropdown has 27 options (Alle anzeigen, Asien-Pazifik, Europa, etc.)
Selecting tenant filters locations correctly (10 -> 0 for Asien-Pazifik)
Sync button triggers location sync with tenant filter
Toast notifications show correct sync count and tenant info

tenant_dropdown.location: DeviceSetup.jsx inside AdminPanel -> Geräte & Scanner -> Geräteeinrichtung accordion

backend_endpoints./api/unified-locations/tenants: Returns all tenants with optional level/parent_id filters
backend_endpoints./api/unified-locations/all: Returns locations with optional tenant_id filter
